sourceMovie.title: Captain America: Civil War
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Captain America: Civil War for the same reason it broke through in 2016: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a action rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Joe Russo keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The adventure and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Avengers
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Captain America: Civil War clicked for you, The Avengers (2012) is a strong next stop: both trade in adventure and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Avengers: Infinity War
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Captain America: Civil War clicked for you, Avengers: Infinity War (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in adventure and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Captain America: Civil War?
faq.answer: Try The Avengers, Avengers: Infinity War, Black Panther—each shares DNA with Captain America: Civil War while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Captain America: Civil War?
faq.answer: Captain America: Civil War (2016) is best described as Adventure, Action, Science Fiction. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Captain America: Civil War part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Captain America Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
